Header file for GPIO initialization and configuration functions for STM32F2 and STM32F4 microcontrollers.

# Purpose
This header file provides an interface for configuring and controlling General-Purpose Input/Output (GPIO) pins on STM32 microcontrollers. It includes conditional compilation directives to include the appropriate STM32 GPIO header file based on the microcontroller family, either `stm32f2xx_gpio.h` or `stm32f4xx_gpio.h`. The file defines several functions to manage GPIO pins, including [`gpio_use`](<#gpio_use>) and [`gpio_release`](<#gpio_release>), which are used to acquire and release control of a GPIO port.

The file also declares functions for initializing GPIO pins as outputs ([`gpio_output_init`](<#gpio_output_init>)), setting the state of output pins ([`gpio_output_set`](<#gpio_output_set>)), and configuring GPIO pins for alternate functions ([`gpio_af_init`](<#gpio_af_init>)). These functions take configuration structures as parameters, such as `OutputConfig` and `AfConfig`, which define the pin settings. The functions allow specification of output type, speed, and pull-up/pull-down configurations, with notes on minimizing interference by setting the slew rate appropriately. This file is intended to be included in other C source files to provide GPIO configuration and control functionality.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
- `stm32f2xx_gpio.h`
- `stm32f4xx_gpio.h`
- `board/board.h`
